name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: Centralized platform for students to apply for scholarships offered by central and state governments.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vidyalakshmi Scheme
description: Provides students with access to education loans through a single window platform.

name: Mid-Day Meal Scheme (PM Poshan)
description: Provides free nutritious meals to school children to improve enrollment, retention, and attendance.

name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Integrated scheme for school education covering pre-school to class 12, focusing on quality and equity.

name: PM eVIDYA
description: Digital education initiative providing multi-mode access to online learning resources for students.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMSS)
description: Scholarship support for meritorious students from economically weaker sections to reduce dropouts.

name: National Overseas Scholarship
description: Financial assistance to students from marginalized communities to pursue higher studies abroad.

name: Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA)
description: Centrally sponsored scheme to improve access, equity, and quality in state higher education institutions.

name: SWAYAM
description: Free online courses for students and teachers across India, covering school, college, and professional learning.

name: GIAN (Global Initiative of Academic Networks)
description: Brings international faculty to Indian institutions to enhance academic collaboration and research.

name: IMPRINT
description: Research initiative to address major engineering and science challenges in India.

name: Unnat Bharat Abhiyan
description: Connects higher education institutions with rural communities to address development challenges.

name: National Digital Library of India (NDLI)
description: Provides free access to millions of digital learning resources for students and researchers.

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
description: Scholarship scheme for girl students pursuing technical education.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
description: Scholarship for differently-abled students pursuing technical education.

name: National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning (NPTEL)
description: Online courses and certification in engineering, science, and humanities by IITs and IISc.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students pursuing science education and research.

name: Ishan Uday Scholarship
description: Special scholarship scheme for students from the North Eastern Region.

name: National Fellowship for SC Students
description: Fellowship for Scheduled Caste students pursuing higher education.

name: National Fellowship for OBC Students
description: Fellowship scheme to support higher education for students belonging to Other Backward Classes.

name: National Fellowship for ST Students
description: Scholarship and fellowship support for Scheduled Tribe students pursuing higher education.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Caste students studying at post-matriculation level.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students studying at post-matriculation level.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Caste students studying at pre-matriculation level.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students studying at pre-matriculation level.

name: National Fellowship for Persons with Disabilities
description: Fellowship scheme for students with disabilities pursuing higher education.

name: Maulana Azad National Fellowship
description: Scholarship for students belonging to minority communities pursuing higher education.

name: National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education (NSIGSE)
description: Financial incentive to promote enrollment of girls in secondary education.

name: Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS) Initiatives
description: Central government schools providing quality education across India.

name: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) Scheme
description: Residential schools providing free quality education to talented rural children.

name: National Bal Bhawan Scheme
description: Promotes creative activities and learning opportunities for children.

name: National Book Trust Initiatives
description: Promotes reading culture and affordable educational books across India.

name: National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) Schemes
description: Curriculum development, teacher training, and educational research initiatives.

name: National Institute of Open Schooling (NIOS)
description: Provides flexible education opportunities for school dropouts and adult learners.

name: PM Research Fellowship
description: Supports doctoral research in frontier areas of science and technology.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: Encourages skill development through apprenticeship training.

name: Skill India Mission
description: Provides vocational training and skill development programs for youth.

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Flagship skill development scheme offering free training and certification.

name: National Institute Ranking Framework (NIRF)
description: Framework to rank higher education institutions in India based on performance.

name: National Mission on Education through ICT (NMEICT)
description: Promotes ICT-enabled learning and digital classrooms across India.

name: National Innovation and Start-up Policy for Students
description: Encourages innovation and entrepreneurship among students in higher education institutions.

name: National Skill Development Mission
description: Coordinates skill development initiatives across ministries and industries.

name: National Institute of Technical Teachers Training and Research (NITTTR)
description: Provides training and development programs for technical teachers.

name: National Institute of Educational Planning and Administration (NIEPA)
description: Focuses on educational planning, policy, and administration research.

name: National Mission for Teachers and Teaching (NMTT)
description: Improves teacher education and professional development programs.

name: National Programme for Mid-Day Meal in Schools
description: Provides nutritious meals to school children to enhance learning outcomes.

name: National Institute of Open Learning Initiatives
description: Supports lifelong learning opportunities through open schooling.

name: National Literacy Mission
description: Promotes adult literacy and continuing education programs.

name: National Adult Education Programme
description: Provides basic literacy and vocational training for adults.

name: National Programme for Development of Sports in Schools
description: Encourages sports and physical education in schools.

name: National ICT Award for Teachers
description: Recognizes teachers who effectively use ICT in education.

name: National Institute of Educational Technology
description: Develops educational technology tools and resources for schools.

name: National Programme for Inclusive Education
description: Supports inclusive education for children with special needs.

name: National Mission on Libraries
description: Modernizes and digitizes libraries across India for better access.

name: National Programme for Quality Education in Madrassas (NPQEM)
description: Provides modern subjects and quality education support in madrassas.

name: National Fellowship for Higher Education of ST Students
description: Supports Scheduled Tribe students pursuing MPhil and PhD programs.

name: National Fellowship for Higher Education of Minority Students
description: Scholarship support for minority students pursuing higher education.

name: National Programme for Teacher Training
description: Provides training modules and workshops for school teachers.

name: National Mission for Skill Development in Higher Education
description: Integrates skill development with higher education curricula.

name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Provides free health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

name: Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY)
description: Establishes AIIMS-like institutions and upgrades government medical colleges to improve healthcare infrastructure.

name: National Health Mission (NHM)
description: Umbrella program covering rural and urban health services, maternal and child health, and disease control.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
description: Cash incentive scheme to promote institutional deliveries among poor pregnant women.

name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK)
description: Provides free delivery, free drugs, diagnostics, and transport for pregnant women and sick newborns.

name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
description: Early identification and treatment of children from birth to 18 years for health conditions.

name: National Programme for Health Care of the Elderly (NPHCE)
description: Provides specialized healthcare services to elderly people at primary, secondary, and tertiary levels.

name: National Tobacco Control Programme (NTCP)
description: Aims to reduce tobacco consumption and related health risks through awareness and regulation.

name: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)
description: Provides community-based mental health services and integrates mental health into general healthcare.

name: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP)
description: Prevention, care, and treatment services for HIV/AIDS patients across India.

name: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme (NVBDCP)
description: Controls malaria, dengue, chikungunya, kala-azar, and other vector-borne diseases.

name: National Leprosy Eradication Programme (NLEP)
description: Provides free diagnosis and treatment for leprosy patients to eliminate the disease.

name: National Tuberculosis Elimination Programme (NTEP)
description: Aims to eliminate tuberculosis in India by 2025 through free diagnosis and treatment.

name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan (PMSMA)
description: Provides free antenatal care to pregnant women on the 9th of every month.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer, Diabetes, Cardiovascular Diseases and Stroke (NPCDCS)
description: Focuses on prevention, early diagnosis, and management of non-communicable diseases.

name: National Programme for Control of Blindness and Visual Impairment (NPCBVI)
description: Provides free eye care services and cataract surgeries to reduce blindness.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Deafness (NPPCD)
description: Provides early diagnosis and treatment of hearing impairment.

name: National Oral Health Programme (NOHP)
description: Promotes oral health awareness and provides preventive dental care services.

name: National Programme for Palliative Care (NPPC)
description: Provides palliative care services for patients with life-threatening diseases.

name: Pradhan Mantri Bharatiya Jan Aushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP)
description: Provides affordable generic medicines through Jan Aushadhi Kendras across India.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Fluorosis (NPPCF)
description: Addresses health issues caused by excess fluoride in drinking water.

name: National Programme on Climate Change and Human Health (NPCCHH)
description: Studies and mitigates health impacts of climate change.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Snakebite
description: Provides awareness, prevention, and treatment for snakebite cases.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Occupational Diseases
description: Focuses on occupational health hazards and preventive care.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Zoonotic Diseases
description: Controls diseases transmitted from animals to humans.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Hemoglobinopathies
description: Provides screening and treatment for sickle cell anemia and thalassemia.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Viral Hepatitis
description: Prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of hepatitis infections.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Rabies
description: Provides vaccination and awareness to eliminate rabies.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Japanese Encephalitis
description: Focuses on vaccination and treatment of Japanese Encephalitis.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Kala-Azar
description: Targets elimination of visceral leishmaniasis (Kala-Azar).

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Dengue
description: Awareness, vector control, and treatment for dengue fever.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Chikungunya
description: Vector control and treatment support for chikungunya cases.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Malaria
description: Provides mosquito control, diagnosis, and treatment for malaria.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Polio
description: Immunization program to eradicate polio in India.

name: National Immunization Programme
description: Provides free vaccines for children and pregnant women.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Measles-Rubella
description: Mass immunization campaign against measles and rubella.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of COVID-19
description: Provides vaccination, awareness, and treatment for COVID-19.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Non-Communicable Diseases
description: Addresses lifestyle diseases like diabetes, hypertension, and cancer.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Mortality
description: Focuses on reducing maternal deaths through better healthcare.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Infant Mortality
description: Provides neonatal care and awareness to reduce infant deaths.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Occupational Lung Diseases
description: Provides screening and treatment for workers exposed to dust and chemicals causing lung diseases.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cardiovascular Diseases
description: Focuses on prevention and treatment of heart diseases through awareness and medical support.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Diabetes
description: Provides screening, awareness, and treatment for diabetes patients.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer
description: Supports cancer screening, treatment, and palliative care services.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Stroke
description: Provides awareness and treatment facilities for stroke patients.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Hypertension
description: Focuses on early detection and management of high blood pressure.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Obesity
description: Promotes healthy lifestyle and awareness to reduce obesity-related risks.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Genetic Disorders
description: Provides screening and treatment for congenital and genetic disorders.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Rare Diseases
description: Supports treatment and awareness for rare diseases in India.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Anemia
description: Provides iron and folic acid supplementation to reduce maternal anemia.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Child Malnutrition
description: Provides nutritional supplements and awareness to reduce child malnutrition.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Adolescent Health Issues
description: Focuses on adolescent health, nutrition, and reproductive health education.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Health Issues
description: Provides antenatal and postnatal care to reduce maternal mortality.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Child Health Issues
description: Supports immunization, nutrition, and healthcare for children.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Adolescent Reproductive Health
description: Provides reproductive health education and services for adolescents.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Mortality due to Hemorrhage
description: Focuses on reducing maternal deaths caused by hemorrhage.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Neonatal Mortality
description: Provides neonatal care facilities to reduce newborn deaths.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Infant Malnutrition
description: Provides nutritional support and awareness to reduce infant malnutrition.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal and Child Health
description: Umbrella program covering maternal and child healthcare services.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Reproductive Health Issues
description: Provides reproductive health awareness and services for women.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Provides 100 days of guaranteed wage employment to rural households.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Offers skill training and certification to youth for better employment opportunities.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Promotes skill development and placement for rural youth.

name: Pradhan Mantri Rojgar Protsahan Yojana (PMRPY)
description: Incentivizes employers to generate new employment by providing EPF support.

name: National Career Service (NCS)
description: Online platform connecting job seekers with employers, training providers, and career counselors.

name: Prime Minister’s Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Provides financial assistance to set up micro-enterprises in rural and urban areas.

name: Start-up India Scheme
description: Promotes entrepreneurship and innovation with funding and incubation support.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Provides loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for setting up enterprises.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: Encourages apprenticeship training by sharing costs with employers.

name: Skill India Mission
description: Umbrella initiative to train youth in industry-relevant skills.

name: Atal Innovation Mission (AIM)
description: Encourages innovation and entrepreneurship through incubation centers and labs.

name: Make in India
description: Promotes manufacturing and industrial growth to generate employment.

name: Digital India Programme
description: Expands digital infrastructure and skills to create IT-based jobs.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides collateral-free loans to small and micro enterprises.

name: Self Employment and Talent Utilization (SETU)
description: Supports self-employment and startups with funding and mentoring.

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM) - Aajeevika
description: Promotes self-employment and skill development for rural poor.

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maandhan (PM-SYM)
description: Provides pension support for unorganized sector workers.

name: Garib Kalyan Rojgar Abhiyaan
description: Employment initiative for migrant workers affected by COVID-19.

description: Implements skill development programmes across sectors.
